arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

direction.description: The direction of traffic to or from the Route 53 Resolver endpoint (INBOUND or OUTBOUND).

id.description: The unique identifier for the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

ip_addresses.description: A set of IP addresses associated with the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

name.description: The name of the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

protocols.description: The set of protocols used by the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

resolver_endpoint_type.description: The type of the Route 53 Resolver endpoint (e.g., IPv4, IPv6).

status.description: The current status of the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC associated with the Route 53 Resolver endpoint.
